title: Automation - calendar - the first Thursday
excerpt: Relatively new user and feeling stupid but I can’t figure out a way to automate a task to the first Thursday (for example) of a month.  I’ve read through a thread from November and if I understand this correctly, you can…

posts.author: lizbrent (liz brent)
posts.cookedHtml: Relatively new user and feeling stupid but I can’t figure out a way to automate a task to the first Thursday (for example) of a month. I’ve read through a thread from November and if I understand this correctly, you can’t do this very basic automation on Monday???

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @lizbrent! Correct, our recurring automations you’d need to choose X amount of days or weeks or months beginning on a specific day. We have gotten some feedback on this from other users so we are looking into how we can improve the UI here to allow for specific dates to be used when using recurring automations. Stay tuned for more developments here! Cheers!
